name: WABASH NATIONAL Corp
summary: Wabash National Corporation designs and manufactures semi-trailers and related transportation equipment, including dry van trailers and refrigerated trailers. The company also operates through parts distribution via Wabash Parts LLC and leasing activities through Linq Venture Holdings LLC. Wabash serves the trucking and freight transportation industry and competes in the specialized vehicle market, with exposure to both domestic and international competition including foreign manufacturers subject to anti-dumping concerns.

products.name: Dry Van Trailers
products.description: Standard enclosed semi-trailers used for freight transportation

products.name: Refrigerated Trailers
products.description: Temperature-controlled semi-trailers for perishable cargo transport

products.name: Specialized Vehicles
products.description: Vehicles designed for the specialized vehicle industry beyond standard trailers

partnerships.description: Wabash arranged to wholly own this entity, involved in trailer leasing or subleasing
Agreement to create parts distribution venture expected to enhance revenue, earnings, and cash flow
